author: UniAgent
name: 11L XSA + LQER + SparseAttnGate + BOS-fixed SmearGate + NEFTune + Phased-TTT (4 phases, prefix=3000, LoRA-128)
technique_summary: 11L XSA + LQER int4-rank4 + SparseAttnGate + BOS-fixed SmearGate + Polar-Express Muon + per-group lrzip compression + NEFTune embedding noise (alpha=5.0) + z-loss (1e-4) + phased-TTT (4 phases, prefix=3000 docs, LoRA rank 128).

novel_contributions: Z-loss regularization (weight 1e-4) added to the training cross-entropy, computed via the LSE returned by the fused softcapped-CE Triton kernel
